basic_details.job_title: RNSB Jr. Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank (RNSB) Jr. Executive (Trainee) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website rnsbindia.com. The RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026 invites eligible candidates to apply for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) post on a contractual basis.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts). 2 year course.
qualification.details: Jr. Executive (Trainee): First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts). 2 year course. 2 years' experience in any Co-Operative bank or any financial institute is preferable. Candidate Should be well versed with Computer knowledge (Freshers may apply).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) position at Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be First Class Graduates (except Arts) or Postgraduates (except Arts) with a 2-year course. Freshers are also encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: While 2 years of experience in a Co-Operative bank or financial institute is preferable, freshers are also welcome to apply for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must download the application form, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Jr. Executive (Trainee) position is offered on a fixed-term contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Does RNSB offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are usually provided in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for specific information.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Paddhari city in Gujarat.
